mapper.update: update delivery_address set delivery_label = #{delivery_label}, recipient_name = #{recipient_name}, recipient_phone = #{recipient_phone}, zip_code = #{zip_code}, delivery_address1 = #{delivery_address1}, delivery_address2 = #{delivery_address2}, delivery_request = #{delivery_request} where delivery_address_idx = #{delivery_address_idx} and member_idx = #{member_idx}
mapper.insert: insert into delivery_address( member_idx, delivery_label, recipient_name, recipient_phone, zip_code, delivery_address1, delivery_address2, delivery_request ) values ( #{member_idx}, #{delivery_label}, #{recipient_name}, #{recipient_phone}, #{zip_code}, #{delivery_address1}, #{delivery_address2}, #{delivery_request} )
